# UnR Accessories

UnR Accessories is a jewelry brand seeking a modern online presence. The brand name 'UnR' suggests a contemporary, edgy, and possibly unconventional identity within the accessories space.

Source: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app

---

## Defy the Ordinary in Style — UnR Accessories

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app
Description: Discover UnR Accessories, where edgy meets elegant. Explore our unconventional jewelry and accessories inspired by iconic chanel costume jewelry earrings. Start your style revolution today.

UnR Accessories

# Contemporary jewelry for unforgettable moments.


### UnR Accessories creates refined pieces for modern gifting, bridal styling, and everyday ceremony.


Discover the Atelier
Request a Styling Note

The UnR Atelier


## Designed with restraint,chosen with intention.


UnR Accessories is a contemporary jewelry brand balancing refined silhouettes, meaningful detail, and modern occasion styling. Each piece is crafted for the discerning wearer — whether marking a milestone, curating a signature look, or discovering the quiet confidence that comes with exceptional design.

Learn Our Story
























## The UnR point of view.


Quiet luxury defined by intention, not ornament.














### Modern Heirloom Feel


Pieces designed to transcend seasons, crafted with a timeless silhouette that feels both current and collectible. Every detail is considered for longevity, not just the moment.












### Gift-Ready Presentation


Arriving in considered packaging with a tactile, unboxing experience that mirrors the care within. From our hands to yours, each piece is prepared to delight without excess.












### Conscious Material Mindset


We select materials with a thoughtful eye, favoring enduring metals and responsibly sourced elements. Refinement that respects both the wearer and the world it comes from.



















## Made for the moments people remember.













### Bridal Finishing Touches


Curated accents that complete the look with quiet grace. From luminous pearl drops to sculptural hair vines, each piece is selected to feel both timeless and personal.














### Gifts That Feel Personal


Thoughtful pieces chosen to express genuine sentiment. Whether it's a milestone birthday or a just-because gesture, our edit makes finding the right piece effortless.











### Everyday Pieces with Presence


Sculptural forms and refined textures that elevate the everyday. These are the pieces you reach for instinctively, designed to hold their own with quiet confidence.









Start with a Styling Note














## Let us help you choose the piece that feels exactly right.


Whether you are styling a wedding look, selecting a meaningful gift, or discovering your everyday signature, UnR Accessories can guide the choice.


Contact the Atelier
View Bridal & Gifts




### Gift Presentation


Each order is wrapped with care, ready to delight.




### Bridal Styling


Personal consultations for a radiant, cohesive look.




### Considered Details


Fine materials and thoughtful design in every piece.














Refined modern atelier — quietly luxurious jewelry and accessories for bridal, gifting, and everyday elegance.

## Say &#39;I Do&#39; to Unconventional Bridal Glam — UnR Accessories

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app/bridal-gifts
Description: Curate a bridal look that breaks tradition. Shop our unique collection rivaling kendra scott bridal jewelry and chanel costume jewelry for gifts that captivate. Find your forever sparkle.

Say 'I Do' to Unconventional Bridal Glam — UnR Accessories

- Home

Products













Bridal & Gifts


# Bridal jewelry and gifts with lasting presence.


### UnR Accessories is a thoughtful choice for weddings, anniversaries, bridesmaids, and meaningful personal gifting — pieces designed to be cherished beyond a single day.


Inquire About Bridal
Explore Gifts













## Choose by Occasion


From the walk down the aisle to the quiet moments of personal triumph, every milestone deserves a piece as remarkable as the memory. Our atelier curates refined selections for life's most cherished chapters.












Bridal Collection

### For the Bride


A radiant look demands jewelry that illuminates without overshadowing. Discover pieces that complement your gown, veil, and vision — from heirloom-worthy pearl strands to contemporary sculptural cuffs. Our stylists work one-on-one to find the perfect balance of tradition and edge.

Inquire for Styling









Gifting

### For the Bridal Party


Thank your inner circle with a gift they'll treasure long after the last dance. Our curated edit of matching earrings, personalized pendants, and stackable rings creates a cohesive, camera-ready aesthetic that each bridesmaid can style her own way.

Explore Group Gifting









Milestones

### For the Anniversary


Mark the years with a piece that tells your story. Whether it's a modern diamond band to celebrate a decade or a bespoke locket for your first year, our atelier specializes in pieces that feel deeply personal and intentionally chosen.

View Anniversary Edit









Self-Celebration

### For the Personal Milestone


A promotion. A new chapter. A promise to yourself. Some moments call for jewelry that feels like armor. Explore our collection of statement pieces and everyday luxuries designed to celebrate the woman you're becoming.

Shop the Edit








Not sure where to begin? Our stylists offer complimentary virtual or in-person consultations.

Contact the Atelier







## A considered experience from selection to presentation






### Refined Gift Wrapping


Each UnR piece arrives encased in our signature suede-lined box, finished with a hand-tied grosgrain ribbon and a personal note. The unboxing is as considered as the jewelry itself.






### Styling Guidance


Our stylists curate pairings for the aisle, the evening, and the everyday. From bridal earrings that echo a gown's lace to layered necklaces for modern separates, we help you shape the moment.






### Occasion-Ready Details


A hidden safety clasp, a whisper of 18k gold plate, a profile that sits perfectly against the skin — these are the quiet details that make a piece feel destined for the day.



















## Not sure where to begin?


Finding the perfect piece should feel effortless. Whether you're curating a bridal look, searching for a meaningful gift, or refreshing your everyday essentials, we're here to help. Simply share a few details, and we'll respond with a personalized styling note tailored just for you.







Tell us the occasion





Share the preferred tone





Mention any metal or silhouette preference



Request Guidance











Refined modern atelier — quietly luxurious jewelry and accessories for bridal, gifting, and everyday elegance.

## Crafting Rebellion: Inside Our Atelier — UnR Accessories

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app/atelier-story
Description: Step into the UnR atelier where chaos meets craftsmanship. See how we forge pieces that rival chanel costume jewelry earrings and redefine modern luxury. Join our creative rebellion.

Crafting Rebellion: Inside Our Atelier — UnR Accessories














































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- Bridal & Gifts
- Atelier Story
- Lookbook
- Contact
0













Products

















# A modern atelier for pieces with meaning.


UnR Accessories is a refined, contemporary studio creating jewelry with intention. Each piece is designed for those who value beauty with clarity and edge — sculptural forms, honest materials, and a quiet confidence that elevates everyday adornment into personal expression.

Explore the Collection



















## What guides the work.


Our principles are rooted in a quiet confidence—ensuring every piece feels intentional, considered, and timeless.









01

### Refined Simplicity


We believe luxury lives in restraint. Stripping away excess reveals the quiet strength of pure form, allowing the wearer—not the ornament—to take center stage. Every curve is essential; nothing is superfluous.








02

### Responsible Consideration


Mindful sourcing and enduring craftsmanship are at our core. We design with the future in mind, selecting materials that honor both the earth and the artisan. Our pieces are made to be cherished across generations, not seasons.








03

### Occasion-Led Design


Whether it's a bride's first look or a milestone anniversary, our collections are conceived around life's most meaningful moments. We craft heirlooms that hold memory, transforming precious metals into tangible markers of time.















## From inspiration to presentation.





01


### Select the mood


Begin by choosing the emotional tone and aesthetic direction. Whether it's a bridal glow, an everyday signature, or an evening statement, the mood shapes every detail that follows.





02


### Refine the silhouette


We study proportion, scale, and movement. Each curve and contour is refined until the piece feels as natural on the body as it looks in the hand.





03


### Consider the occasion


A piece should meet the moment. We consider light, fabric, and setting to ensure the accessory complements the occasion without competing for attention.





04


### Present with care


The final presentation mirrors the quality of the design. Every piece is delivered in packaging that feels as considered and refined as the accessory inside.













## Materials, light, and the final detail.


The visual language of UnR Accessories is defined by clean metals, luminous finishes, and soft textures. Each piece is crafted to capture contemporary elegance — from the subtle weight of a clasp to the gentle shimmer of a pearl, every detail is considered. Our atelier approach ensures that bridal jewelry and everyday accessories alike feel sculptural, refined, and effortlessly modern.































Refined modern atelier — quietly luxurious jewelry and accessories for bridal, gifting, and everyday elegance.

## Wear the Unexpected: Our Visual Manifesto — UnR Accessories

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app/lookbook
Description: Immerse yourself in our lookbook, a visual manifesto of edgy elegance. Discover how to style pieces inspired by chanel costume jewelry and kendra scott bridal jewelry. Get the look now.

Wear the Unexpected: Our Visual Manifesto — UnR Accessories














































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- Bridal & Gifts
- Atelier Story
- Lookbook
- Contact
0



















# The UnR Lookbook



A curated visual world of bridal details, gift moments, and modern everyday styling. Explore the refined artistry of UnR Accessories through an editorial lens that celebrates quiet luxury and contemporary elegance.























## The Lookbook


A curated visual narrative of our latest collection, where modern elegance meets timeless craftsmanship.





Products

















### Ceremony Light


The quiet radiance of a bride. Our signature freshwater pearls and hand-set crystals capture the soft, hopeful light of the ceremony hour.











### The Gift Table


An artful presentation for life's most cherished moments. Each piece arrives wrapped in our signature cream and gold, ready for giving.











### Close to the Skin


Intimate, barely-there pieces designed to become a second skin. 14k gold-filled chains that move with you, catching light with every breath.











### Pearl and Metal


A study in contrast: the organic, iridescent surface of a baroque pearl against the cool, brushed finish of polished brass. Texture is our language.











### Evening Detail


The finishing touch for after-dark dressing. Sculptural cuffs and statement rings engineered to catch candlelight and hold a room's attention.











### Everyday Ritual


The quiet luxury of a morning routine. Simple gold hoops and a whisper-thin bracelet elevate the everyday into something intentional.













## Three ways to wear the mood.


Style directions: Bridal Minimal, Sculptural Gift, Modern Everyday.












### Bridal Minimal


For the modern bride who believes less is infinitely more. Clean lines, luminous pearls, and whisper-thin gold chains create a presence that feels both timeless and refreshingly current. Each piece is designed to frame, never overshadow — letting the wearer's natural radiance take center stage on the most photographed day of her life.











### Sculptural Gift


Gifting becomes an art form. Our sculptural pieces — bold cuffs, architectural pendants, and fluid metal forms — arrive wrapped with the same intention poured into their design. Ideal for milestone celebrations, these are heirlooms in the making, chosen by those who understand that the most memorable gifts are objects of lasting beauty and tactile wonder.











### Modern Everyday


Elevate the ritual of getting dressed. Our everyday collection is built around pieces that move with you — lightweight hoops, versatile chain necklaces, and stacking rings that feel like a second skin. Designed for the woman whose uniform is quiet confidence, these are the accessories she reaches for instinctively, morning after morning, because they simply feel like her.















## See a mood you love?



Share the lookbook direction that feels closest, and UnR Accessories can help guide the next step. From elegant bridal jewelry to refined everyday staples, our styling team is ready to curate pieces that speak to your personal aesthetic.

Ask for Styling Guidance


Bridal
Gift
Everyday












Refined modern atelier — quietly luxurious jewelry and accessories for bridal, gifting, and everyday elegance.

Description: Ready to redefine your accessory game? Contact UnR Accessories for bespoke pieces that rival chanel costume jewelry earrings and elevate your look. Let&#39;s make a statement together.

Start Your Style Conspiracy with Us — UnR Accessories

# Contact the atelier



We welcome inquiries for bridal styling, gifting guidance, and general brand questions. Share the occasion, timeline, and your preferred style direction — our team will craft a thoughtful response.








## How we can help


Whether you are curating a bridal suite, searching for the perfect gift, or simply exploring our collections, we invite you to reach out. Let us know the occasion, your timeline, and the style direction you have in mind. We look forward to guiding you.


- Bridal & occasion styling

- Gift guidance & personal shopping

- General brand inquiries


Start a conversation














## Send a note.



Tell us whether you are choosing for yourself, a gift, or a wedding moment.





Name



Email



Phone



Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  |

Return Policy
and  Privacy Policy


Send Inquiry








## Helpful details to include




### The Occasion


Whether you're selecting a gift for someone special, accessorizing for a celebration, or treating yourself, letting us know the event helps us guide you toward the perfect piece.




### The Desired Mood


Do you envision something understated and classic, or bold and contemporary? Share the feeling you want the piece to evoke — we'll help translate it into a design that feels unmistakably yours.




### The Timing


If you have a deadline in mind — a wedding date, anniversary, or special event — please mention it. We'll confirm availability and ensure your piece arrives with time to spare.












## A thoughtful reply, not a rushed transaction.



Every inquiry receives the same care and attention we put into our pieces. From the first question to the final detail, we're here to make your experience personal, unhurried, and genuinely helpful.









### Personal Guidance


You're never just a number. We listen carefully to your style, budget, and occasion to offer thoughtful, one-to-one recommendations.









### Bridal-Friendly Detail


We understand the importance of every piece on your special day. Our team is experienced in coordinating bridal jewelry with patience and precision.









### Gift-Conscious Care


Looking for the perfect gift? We'll help you choose with confidence, offering discreet guidance, beautiful packaging, and flexible returns.
















Refined modern atelier — quietly luxurious jewelry and accessories for bridal, gifting, and everyday elegance.

## Return Policy

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - UnR Accessories




































































- Products Products




- Home
- Bridal & Gifts
- Atelier Story
- Lookbook
- Contact
0













Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 7/9/2026



At UnR Accessories, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

































- Products Products

0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/9/2026



UnR Accessories ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: UnR Accessories

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://unr-accessories-3432d906.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products Products




- Home
- Bridal & Gifts

- Contact
0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 9, 2026



UnR Accessories is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: UnR Accessories

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














Refined modern atelier — quietly luxurious jewelry and accessories for bridal, gifting, and everyday elegance.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

- Products Products




- Home

0















# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 9, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - UnR Accessories

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Jewelry & Accessories provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


UnR Accessories provides Jewelry & Accessories through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by UnR Accessories. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: UnR Accessories

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
